best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-businessprofile-004 title: accessing conferma riuscita from business profile module: businessprofile source pages: 5 preconditions: a user is logged in and a business profile exists. test data: test steps: 1. log in as a user. 2. perform a search for items. 3. click on a result item. 4. click on the "business profile" option. 5. click on the "conferma riuscita" option. 6. wait for the confirmation to be processed. expected result: - confirmation is processed successfully. - user is informed that the confirmation was successful.

item_text: profile -> chatsection — condition="cliccata icona accesso alle chat";
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-chat-001 title: navigating to chat list module: chat source pages: 3 preconditions: a user is logged in. test data: test steps: 1. log in as a user. 2. navigate to the chat section. 3. click on the "access chat" icon. 4. wait for the chat list to load. expected result: - chat list is loaded successfully. - user is presented with the chat list.

item_text: chatsection -> generaldashboard — condition="cliccata icona accesso generale";
best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-generaldashboard-001 title: scrolling through posts module: generaldashboard source pages: 4 preconditions: a user is logged in and posts exist. test data: test steps: 1. log in as a user. 2. navigate to the general dashboard. 3. scroll through the posts. 4. wait for the posts to load. expected result: - posts are loaded successfully. - user can see all the posts in the feed.

test case id: tc-post-001 title: posting a comment successfully module: post source pages: 1, 4 preconditions: a user is logged in and a post exists. test data: - comment: "this is a test comment." test steps: 1. log in as a user. 2. navigate to the post details page. 3. enter the comment text. 4. click on the "post comment" button. 5. wait for the system response. expected result: - comment is posted successfully. - user is redirected to the post details page.

best_testcase_text: test case id: tc-storeddatadb-001 title: user creation process - valid credentials module: storeddatadb source pages: 6 preconditions: no existing user with the same username. test data: test steps: 1. navigate to the user creation page. 2. enter the username, password, name, surname, and localization. 3. click on the "create user" button. 4. wait for the system response. expected result: - user creation is successful. - new user entry is created in the database.
